heading_title: Token symbols can cause a revert on pair creation
content:
L-01 Token symbols can cause a revert on pair creation
File(s): utils.cairo, pair.cairo

Description: Generating pair symbols doesn’t check for the length of token symbols. It causes
reversion while creating a pair.
let (pair_mix, mix_multiplier) = join_short_strings(token_0_symbol, '/',
token_1_symbol);


Recommendation: Consider using byte31 arrays for storing strings.

heading_title: The swap fee can be higher than the limit
Selector callback for transferFrom is unnecessary
Wrong starknet version specified in scarb.toml
content:
I-03 Wrong starknet version specified in scarb.toml


 ev
File(s): scarb.toml

Description: The starknet version in scarb config is wrong, and versions mismatch with other


   ie
dependencies.
[dependencies]



     w
starknet = "2.2.0"


Recommendation: Consider changing the starknet version in scarb.toml to 2.4.0.

heading_title: Use internal traits for internal contract methods
content:
BP-01 Use internal traits for internal contract methods
File(s): router.cairo, factory.cairo, pair.cairo

Description: Internal methods outside of the external trait have no access to the state. State
parameter has to be passed all the time.

Recommendation: Consider implementing internal traits for internal methods.

BP-02 Unnecessary storage writings
File(s): factory.cairo, pair.cairo                                        V.
Description: The initial values of these variables in storage are already zero and false. There is



                                                   Er
no need to write at constructor.

Pair.cairo



                                                     im
self._locked.write(false); // @audit Unnecessary storage write.


Factory.cairo
self._num_of_pairs.write(0); // @audit Unnecessary storage write.




                                     by
Recommendation: Consider removing these lines.

BP-03 Unnecessary assert statement
File(s): factory.cairo




R
Description: The sort_token_pair function already checking whether tokens are zero or not.
assert(token_0.is_non_zero(), 'ZERO_ADDRESS'); // @audit Unnecessary



 ev
assertion. Zero address check is already done at sort_token_pair




   ie
Recommendation: Consider whether this check is still needed or not.




     w

BP-04 Store strings as byte31 array
File(s): utils.cairo

Description: Cairo version 2.5.0 started to support byte31 arrays, which can be used to store
strings.

Recommendation: Consider using byte31 array for string operations & storage.
